nodes.label: AI as rapid idea generator for brainstorming
nodes.label_negative: AI as impractical idea generator due to lack of real-world constraints
nodes.grounding_span: it often comes up with stuff that's impossible, either from a budgetary or logistical or other standpoint

nodes.label: AI as tool for pitch deck creation and refinement
nodes.label_negative: Manual pitch deck creation without AI
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to create pitch presentations, both for brainstorming the language of the pitch and for creating the images

nodes.label: AI as competitive advantage in industry
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to jobs and industry norms
nodes.grounding_span: my competition is probably using it, so why hold myself back by not taking advantage of it?

nodes.label: Preserving personal creative ownership of core game rules
nodes.label_negative: Delegating core creative conception to AI
nodes.grounding_span: i generally like to conceive the basic rules of the game myself. it almost takes some of the fun out of it if i let AI figure that part out

nodes.label: AI as tool for visual innovation in pitch decks
nodes.grounding_span: I sometimes use AI to put motion of what I would have formally presented as still images

nodes.label: Creative satisfaction and professional recognition
nodes.grounding_span: that made me feel great. I felt not only creative, but a bit like a pioneer, and I think that boosted my reputation

nodes.label: Efficiency and speed in work processes
nodes.grounding_span: it's much faster, in that AI will generally offer 5 or more different ways to potentially go in an instant

nodes.label: Personal creative autonomy and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to get to the point that I'm incapable of generating an original thought or two on my own

nodes.label: Pride and satisfaction from pioneering AI use
nodes.grounding_span: the initial response to my pitch decks with AI was really positive -- almost disbelieving -- and that made me feel great

nodes.label: Concern about over-dependence on AI
nodes.grounding_span: Becoming too dependent is definitely a concern

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI as competitive necessity
nodes.grounding_span: my competition is probably using it, so why hold myself back by not taking advantage of it?

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's impractical suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: it often comes up with stuff that's impossible

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through slide-by-slide feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I'll then go slide by slide and have it help me correct and/or punch up the language

nodes.label: Selective delegation with personal ownership of core creative
nodes.grounding_span: i generally like to conceive the basic rules of the game myself
